content.en:
After Ye Tian found out the approximate time of the Hurricane Pavilion's move, he was ready to start planning.

He wouldn't act with the Hurricane Pavilion, but was going to replicate a voidless galactic creature comparable to a mid-tier immeasurable lifeform, there were too many such creatures in the voidless galaxy.

And as long as you copy the empty galactic creatures in distant areas, your identity will not be revealed, and you can sneak into the territory where the overlord is located when the time comes.

And the information about the Voidless Galaxy Overlord, Ye Tian also collected it, it was a high-level immeasurable life form, the Void Whale.

This overlord is a top-notch existence among the high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and he is also in the voidless galaxy, occupying a geographical advantage.

There are also five existences comparable to ordinary high-level immeasurable lifeforms under the Void Whale, as well as thousands of middle-level immeasurable lifeform creatures, tens of thousands of primary-level immeasurable lifeform creatures, and countless creatures second only to the Great Ancestor.

If it was in the Hurricane Territory, such a scale would not be nothing, but in the Voidless Galaxy, even if the Hurricane Pavilion poured out, it would not be able to help this overlord, and a forced invasion would be killed by the counter-killing.

Therefore, only the confluence period can hope to win.

......

Time passed slowly, and a large number of mid-level immeasurable lifeforms in the Hurricane Territory had signed up to participate in the actions of the Hurricane Pavilion, and even other territories outside the Hurricane Territory had Great Ancestors coming over one after another.

And the arrival of the meeting period is getting closer and closer, and many of the Great Ancestors of the Hurricane Collar are also beginning to prepare.

But the Void Whale, the overlord of the Voidless Galaxy, did not react, and it did not know that the Hurricane Leader was going to attack him, because the creatures of the Voidless Galaxy did not communicate with the outside world, so naturally there was no way to know the news of the Hurricane Lord.

Of course.

The Void Whale also knew about the Convergence Period, after all, the Convergence Period was not the first time, so he gathered all his subordinates together and waited for the Convergence Period to arrive.

The intersection period didn't exist for long, so he thought that if he was careful, he would be fine, and he didn't think there would be anything big.

Finally, the meeting time is approaching.

Rumble!!!!

The dense Great Ancestor descended on the edge of the Voidless Galaxy, this is the closest place to the Void Whale Overlord's territory, and from here, you can enter the territory of the Void Whale the fastest.

This time, in order to deal with the Void Whale, the Hurricane Pavilion and other forces dispatched a total of twenty-three high-level immeasurable lifeforms, as well as a large number of middle-level immeasurable lifeforms.

At this time, they are all waiting here, and they will enter the Void Whale Territory at the best time.

And all around, there were also many great ancestors watching, and they didn't sign up to participate, but just came to see the excitement.

One of Ye Tian's replica bodies was also observing nearby, just wanting to grasp the movements of the Hurricane Pavilion, so he came here, and his other replica body of the voidless galaxy creature was already at the bottom of the voidless galaxy river, close to the territory of the Void Whale, and could step into that place at any time and enter the intersection period.

......

"Almost!"

The Pavilion Master of the Hurricane Pavilion, the Hurricane Great Ancestor, a high-level immeasurable life form, deduced the time for a moment and immediately ordered, "All the Great Ancestors will enter the Voidless Galaxy with me!"

In a flash.

A giant boat appeared, and a great ancestor got on this giant boat.

This is not an ordinary giant ship, but a giant ship that can cross the Voidless Galaxy, but a giant ship that the Hurricane Pavilion has spent countless years and countless materials refining to counteract the influence of the Voidless Galaxy.

Without this giant ship, after many middle-level immeasurable lifeforms entered the Voidless Galaxy, their strength would be suppressed to a very low level, and before they reached the territory of the Void Whale, they would have to fight with countless Voidless Galactic creatures.

In this way, not only will there be a fall of middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, but it will also have to delay time, and it will not be able to reach the Void Whale territory in time, thus missing the meeting period.

In the blink of an eye, a large number of Great Ancestors poured into this giant ship, and the giant boat directly escaped into the empty galaxy and disappeared.

All around, the other Great Ancestors were discussing this operation of the Hurricane Pavilion.

"Hurricane Pavilion is really bold, it dares to take the initiative against the void galaxy void whale tyrant, the risk is too great!"

"Although the Hurricane Pavilion has confidence, even if it succeeds, the losses will be extremely heavy!"

"Hehe, where would the high-level leaders of the Hurricane Pavilion care about this loss, for the sake of Hailou Jin, as long as they can improve their strength, even if they sacrifice more Great Ancestors, it is worth it! As for those Great Ancestors who recast resources for their lives, if they take risks for that little resource, maybe they will be lost there!"

"That's it, even if we can't break through to a high-level immeasurable life form, we just need to practice slowly, why bother looking for death!"

"If the Hurricane Pavilion fails, then it's funny, let's go, go back!"

......

The speed of the giant ship of the Hurricane Pavilion in the empty galaxy is very fast, even if a creature sees it, it can't stop it, and if it is forcibly blocked, it will be directly crushed by the giant boat.

Soon.

The Giant Boat arrives at the territory of the Void Whale and arrives at the area where it will enter the meeting period.

At the same time, Ye Tian also let his copy body arrive in this area.

Void Whale Mountain.

This is the residence of the Void Whale Overlord at the bottom of the Voidless Galaxy River, and it has become a time and space of its own.

The Void Whale was usually asleep, but when the meeting was approaching, he had naturally woken up a long time ago, and almost all of his men were in the nearby area, resulting in this area being full of creatures comparable to the Great Ancestor.

Abrupt.

The Void Whale's gaze penetrated the layers of water and sensed the giant ship of the Hurricane Pavilion.

"The giant boat is a force from outside the voidless galaxy!"

The Void Whale was furious.

The forces outside the Void Galaxy dared to come to his territory, and the direction was directly towards the Void Whale Mountain, which was to find him trouble.

It wasn't that there were no forces to trouble him before, but they all died at his hands.

"Convergence period, it seems that this force thinks that my territory is going to enter the intersection period, so it will find an opportunity?"

The Void Whale roared, informing all the creatures under its command, and once waiting for the enemy to arrive, shoot directly.

Airplanes!!!!

The waters began to shake directly.

All the Great Ancestors knew very well that this was about to enter the convergence period!

In an instant, this body of water directly lost contact with the outside world and entered a period of convergence.

During the intersection, the creatures from the outside cannot get in, and the creatures inside cannot get out.

Not only that, but more importantly.

The waters of the Void Whale are equivalent to breaking away from the Voidless Galaxy, losing the suppression of the Voidless Galaxy, although the waters themselves also have a certain amount of suppression, but not as strong as the overall pressure of the Voidless Galaxy!

As a result, the Void Whale is no longer invincible here!

Otherwise, in the voidless galaxy, the Void Whale alone could slaughter the entire Hurricane Pavilion by itself.
